overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character in a dark medieval cloak exploring a foggy, war-torn village at dawn. The character walks through muddy ruins, past wooden barricades and tent encampments, ascending stone stairs toward a fortified gate as the sun breaks through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy medieval ruins with large dead tree and campfire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through foggy medieval ruins toward a large dead tree

entered.detail: gnarled leafless tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
crumbling stone walls and towers shrouded in fog
small burning fire with orange flames and smoke
rusted wooden wagon with broken wheels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy, dark medieval ruin. The character walks forward on a muddy path toward a massive dead tree, with stone ruins visible through the fog ahead and a small campfire burning to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden barricades and makeshift camp perimeter

events.description: fog begins to lift revealing brighter sky and golden sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating between wooden barricades and fences as visibility improves

entered.detail: spiked wooden fence blocking the path
large beige canvas tent with wooden support poles

segments.scene_description: As the fog lifts, the character moves through narrow passages between wooden barricades and fences. The lighting transitions from dark to a diffused morning light, and canvas tents become visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: entering covered tent area with dappled sunlight filtering through canvas
emerging from tents into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through tent encampment passing under canvas canopies and wooden supports

entered.detail: overhead canvas shelter supported by wooden poles
large multi-level stone building with weathered walls
small wooden hut with stacked logs

segments.scene_description: The character walks under canvas canopies through a makeshift camp, transitioning from shaded shelter to bright golden sunlight. A large stone fortress dominates the view ahead, with wooden shacks and tents lining the muddy path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to fortified gate

events.description: beginning ascent up weathered stone stairs toward gate

agents.ego_description: climbing steep stone stairs toward a large fortified wooden gate

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward to the gate
large fortified wooden door with metal reinforcements and beams

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a flight of weathered stone stairs toward a massive wooden gate. The stone fortress walls rise on both sides, with sandbags stacked to the right, as the camera approaches the fortified entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, foggy ruin that gradually opens into a sunlit fortified encampment. It begins on a muddy path beside a burning campfire, moving toward a massive dead tree as stone ruins loom through the dense mist. As the fog lifts and the lighting transitions to a diffused morning glow, the camera weaves through narrow passages of wooden barricades and fences toward distant canvas tents. The scene then shifts from the shade of makeshift canopies into bright golden sunlight, passing wooden shacks that line the way to a dominating stone fortress. Finally, the camera ascends a flight of weathered stone stairs flanked by sandbags, approaching a massive wooden gate set within the towering fortress walls.
